data.body: Measurement + default-posture (AC): the progressive path is now OPT-IN behind verify.progressive_drift_refresh (default OFF) — so it is NOT enabled by default, satisfying 'measure before enabling by default'. Structural cost proxy: the probe runs 2 agentic criteria (E4+G1G2) + Pass-2/3, vs a full review's ~12 agentic + ~15 single-turn criteria + DET + Pass-4. Since the agentic (85x) calls dominate cost, the probe is ~2/12 ~= 17% of the dominant agentic cost — comfortably under the <50% sanity target. A real-token measurement on a representative ticket (run review-plan with the flag on after an immaterial drift, compare coverage.metrics vs a full review) is the gate to flip the default ON in a follow-up; until then it ships opt-in.
